name: CodeQL

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
  schedule:
    - cron: '30 1 * * 0'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  analyze:
    runs-on: windows-latest

    permissions:
      security-events: write
      contents: read

    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        language: [ csharp ]

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v3
        with:
          languages: csharp

      - name: Setup .NET
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: 8.0.x

      - name: Restore
        run: dotnet restore RestaurantPOS.sln

      - name: Build
        run: dotnet build RestaurantPOS.sln --configuration Release --no-restore

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3
